name: Pallof Press
resistance_profile: Anti-rotation core exercise: the cable pulls you into a twist and you resist it — trains the obliques and deep core to brace against rotation.
cues: Stand side-on to the cable, hands at your chest
Press straight out and resist the twist
Brace the abs; don't let your torso rotate
common_errors: Letting the torso rotate toward the cable
Using the arms instead of bracing the core
regressions: Hands held closer to the chest (shorter lever)
